mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, owner_id, schema_json, status, created_at, updated_at FROM form_template WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, name, description, owner_id, schema_json, status, created_at, updated_at FROM form_template WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC
